id: get-trait-values
title: "Query Trait Values"
description: "Batch query the current values of specified traits."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Query Trait Values"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/devices/trait/read"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Batch query the current values of specified traits.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","endpointId","functionCode","traitCodes"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"Device ID"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"Endpoint ID"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"Function code"},"traitCodes":{"type":"array","description":"List of trait codes to be queried","items":{"type":"string"}}},"title":"TraitValueQuery"}}},"title":"TraitReadRequest"},"examples":{"readTraits":{"value":{"data":[{"deviceId":"123456","endpointId":1,"functionCode":"Output","traitCodes":["OnOff"]}]}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
